title: Allow importing multi-file GGUF models
summary:
### What is the issue?

Currently Ollama can [import GGUF files](https://github.com/ollama/ollama/blob/main/docs/import.md). However, larger models are sometimes split into separate files. Ollama should support loading multiple GGUF files similar to loading safetensor files.

_No response_

title: [PR] Add interrupt-driven DIO handling for LoRa driver
summary:
## Summary
Replace busy-wait polling with FreeRTOS event group and GPIO ISR for LoRa TX/RX completion.

## Changes
- Add `LORA_EVENT_TX_DONE_BIT`, `LORA_EVENT_RX_DONE_BIT`, `LORA_EVENT_RX_TIMEOUT_BIT` event bits
- Add `dio1_isr_handler()` static ISR that sets event group bits and calls user callback

title: [PR] jetbrains.jdk: 21.0.9-1163.86 -> 25.0.1-268.52
summary:
Updates the Jetbrains Runtime from Java 21 to  Java 25. The Jetbrains IDEs packages default to JBR as the JDK, updating the Jetbrains JDK to Java 25 allows the IDEs to have access to Java 25 by default. JBR is also often used for developing with DCEVM.
